form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 8th (Fr6) over 2240m at Goulburn was 7th-14.7 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $34. Before that 9th (Sr1) over 2170m at Canberra beaten 30 m by Mister Bluechip (2:40.90) in NR up to 65 on March 15 at $61. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced in the early stages of the event.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr8) over 1609m after being wide early at Menangle beaten 30 m by Emperor (1:52.90) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on February 24 at $7.50. At the previous start 8th (Fr7) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle beaten 30 m by Theres Wally (1:53.10) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on February 3 at $7.50. Has a low draw this time and expected to atone.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to obtain the lead passing the 1800m.
Approaching the 1400m, hung out and struck the sulky wheel of Rivera Lou.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr6) over 1740m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 4th-5.3 beaten 12 m by Ozzie Corka (2:03.90) in NR up to 65 on March 20 at $34. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr7) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 7 m by Benjamin (2:04.60) in NR up to 60 on March 13 at $41. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwards under pressure inside the final 150m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth after being driven well back, behind Franco Nickelback at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 53 on March 20 at $15. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Lit The Wick at Goulburn over 2240m in a NR up to 52 on March 30 at $4.60. Should be there at the business end.
